overall.description: A cinematic third-person game scene depicting a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountain lake during golden hour. The sun sets behind snow-capped peaks, casting dramatic warm light across the natural landscape while birds periodically fly through the sky.

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a breathtaking mountain vista during golden hour. Snow-capped peaks rise in the distance above a calm lake, while the setting sun casts warm light through scattered clouds. A flock of birds flies across the sky, and the character remains stationary, absorbing the panoramic view of the forested valleys and distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary perspective from a rocky cliff edge that emphasizes the vast scale of a mountain vista during the golden hour. It begins with a focus on a hooded character overlooking a calm lake, where the setting sun casts a warm, dramatic glow through scattered clouds. As the camera lingers on the panoramic view, a flock of birds glides across the sky, adding movement to the stillness of the scene. The perspective then expands to encompass the surrounding forested valleys and the towering snow-capped peaks that dominate the distant horizon.
